message:
feat(fwc): wire CommandEnvelope into workflow, task, intent, and batch dispatch functions

Extends CommandEnvelope coverage to 88 return points across all
dispatch function families: pipe, recipe, pipeline, map, batch-file,
task (create/show/list/resolve/ask/bind/approve/advance/run),
intent (plan/explain/do), and suggest-after. Workflow functions use
OfflineArtifact; host-backed functions (map, batch) use LiveRuntime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
